claim: Complete gene table for JCVI-Syn3A parsed from CP016816.2: one row per `gene` feature with locus_tag, gene name, feature subtype (CDS/tRNA/rRNA/ncRNA/tmRNA), start/end coordinates (1-based inclusive), strand, length, product, and protein_id.
source_detail: Built by the parsing script in Session 3 (see commit history). Input: cell_sim/data/Minimal_Cell_ComplexFormation/input_data/syn3A.gb (SHA-256 f1d1d19b3624c8391deff73ab60627478df89cd55dfafdfb67d0df14a7680fdf). Coordinates use GenBank 1-based inclusive convention.
caveats: Coordinates are 1-based inclusive (GenBank convention). Code that uses 0-based half-open intervals (BED / Python slicing) must convert: start_0 = start_1based - 1, end stays.
Genes spanning the origin (wrapping the circular chromosome) are represented with their GenBank location; downstream code must handle circularity.
Pseudogenes and split genes are not separately flagged - refer to the raw GenBank qualifiers for full detail.
